description: CompositionGreen kurta made of 100% cotton, with sort sleeves, round neck with printed tape on the neckline and buttoned chest placket, and has hakoba stitch detailing on the upper chest and along the length of the kurtaFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this green kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh with its contrast print and hakoba stitch detailing, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
